evals.prompt: I want a skill that reads a CSV file with bank statements and categorizes my expenses into Food, Transport, Housing, etc using an LLM. It should output a new CSV.
evals.expected_output: A fully structured technical specification following the 10-point format outlined in the skill instructions.

evals.prompt: Quero uma skill pra analisar commits no github e me gerar um changelog bonitinho de lançamento.
evals.expected_output: A fully structured technical specification following the 10-point format outlined in the skill instructions.
